module: Electric Vehicles - Drives and Control / Mechatronics (Lab)
topics: Load test on dc series motor
Load test on cumulatively compounded dc generator
Load test on differentially compounded dc generator
Load test on dc shunt generator
Open circuit characteristics of dc shunt generator
Load test on dc shunt motor
Load test on three phase squirrel cage induction motor
Load test on three phase slip ring induction motor
Starting of three phase induction motor using star-delta/autotransformer methods
Load test on single phase transformer
OC and SC test on single phase transformer
Study the characteristics of P-I controller
Study the characteristics of RTD and thermocouple
PLC - Simple ladder programming using PLC trainer kit
Checking the engine condition using On Board Diagnosis tool and study Diagnosis trouble codes
Study on the head light adjustments, aiming and focusing methods
Interfacing the sensors and actuators using LabVIEW software
